hipotez: ADVERSARIAL RED-TEAM (deliberate garden-of-forking-paths overfit). A K=24 mom-variant family (lookback {20,40,60,120,180,240} x sign {+continuation,-reversal} x winsorize {none,(0.05,0.95)}) is cherry-picked: the X_1-best variant (best in-arm IC on a FIXED name-split half) is FROZEN, then evaluated on the disjoint X_2 half and pushed through the full conjugate engine (Mod-A+B). PRE-REGISTERED EXPECTATION (overfit must be CAUGHT): (1) X_2 single-split IC collapses (selection tax); (2) conjugate-agreement FAIL (agreement_pass == False); (3) bucket-PBO HIGH (>=0.5); (4) DSR insignificant once N=24-deflated (Bailey-LdP). Expected FAIL == 'the machine works'. Validator-validation (C10-SAFE): an X_2/engine PASS is NOT an edge -- flag common-factor / insufficient-overfit / engine-bug and REPORT; 'edge varmis' interpretation FORBIDDEN.
strangler_constraints: src/engine + committed motorlar (src/backtest, src/screening, lab, clib) DOKUNULMAZ; sadece examples/ + docs/ altinda YENI dosya.
construction_window_ic_horizon_coupling_: construction_window=21 plays a DUAL role (moda.py:427): it is BOTH the signal's engine-facing construction_window AND the Mod-A IC forward-return HORIZON. Every K-variant's OWN lookback/sign/winsorize lives INSIDE scores() and is independent of this horizon. denenen_konfig_sayisi=24 is the HONEST tried-config count N fed to DSR deflation (the family K is frozen in signals.mom_variant_family() BEFORE any measurement). Declared HERE so it is not hidden. NW lag=21 (DialConfig) corrects overlapping 21-day forward-return autocorrelation.
redteam_K_family: lookback{20,40,60,120,180,240} x sign{+1,-1} x winsorize{null,[0.05,0.95]} = 24 (frozen in examples/rry1008/signals.mom_variant_family())
coverage_precondition_note: KAPSAM-GUARD (frozen BEFORE re-measurement; orthogonal to the verdict). The full-2019 survivorship-honest liquid universe is too small for a default Mod-A arm-pair (~38 < 100), so the engine's conjugate leg degenerates to a breadth-guard FAIL. Restricting to eval_window_start=2024-01-02 (10M ADV floor KEPT -- highest, no liquidity relaxation; 75 eligible) with min_names_per_arm=30 (= MIN_NAMES_CROSS_SECTION) actually exercises Mod-A. Window+arm-floor chosen by a COVERAGE sweep, NOT by the verdict. The single-split layer (naive IC on 50/50 halves) needs no such breadth and is reported on the same window.
underpowered_warning: Small arms (~37) -> noisy per-arm conjugate IC; the Mod-A leg is a 'machine-runs + direction sanity-check', not a high-confidence verdict. Pre-registered three-layer expectation UNCHANGED: single-split FAIL | conjugate-agreement FAIL | DSR-deflated-N=24. If any layer PASSes it is flag-not-edge (C10).
